Off Calendar Feb-02-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Deft To Provide Responses To Form Interogg (Set One)
Off Calendar Feb-02-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. COREY PAGE, Esq. of Evans & Page (Tel: 415-896-5072) for plaintiff;
Atty. PATRICIA M. GREEN ROE, Esq. of Samuelson, Wilson & Roe (Tel: 408-790-5320) for defendant Kenneth Tse.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF FRANK VILCHES' Motion To Compel Defendant To Provide Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting in part and denying in part plaintiff's motion. (See signed order for complete ruling.) (302/JPT) *****
